title: Support clocking blocks in virtual interfaces

features.name: interface with clocking block declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains a clocking block with input, output, or inout signals and a clocking event

features.name: virtual interface accessing clocking block signal
features.description: Code should include accessing a clocking block signal through a virtual interface using dotted member selection

features.name: clocking block event in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include using a clocking block referenced through a virtual interface as a clocking event in a sensitivity list
features.snippet:
virtual Iface vif = iface;
@(vif.cb) $display("clocking block event");
